title: Student Academic Programs
description: The academic programs in the home institution in which a prospect, applicant, current student or graduate has expressed interest in, or been enrolled.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the student academic program.

student.title: Student
student.description: The student who is enrolled in an academic program.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Student.

program.title: Academic Program
program.description: The academic program in which a student is enrolled.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Academic Program.

curriculumObjective.title: Curriculum Objective
curriculumObjective.description: The curriculum objective associated with the student's academic program.

preference.title: Preference
preference.description: Indicates the primary academic program of the student.  Only one academic program should be set to preferred for a student.

programOwner.title: Program Owner
programOwner.description: The owner of the academic program.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Program Owner.

site.title: Site
site.description: The site (campus) at which the student is enrolled in the program.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Site.

catalog.title: Academic Catalog
catalog.description: The academic catalog that defines the requirements for a student's enrollment in a program.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Academic Catalog.

academicLevel.title: Academic Level
academicLevel.description: The academic level associated with the enrollment of the student in the academic program.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Academic Level.

credentials.title: Credentials
credentials.description: The academic credentials that can be awarded for completing an academic program.

items.title: Credentials
items.description: The academic credentials that can be awarded for completing an academic program.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Credentials.

disciplines.title: Disciplines
disciplines.description: The academic disciplines offered as part of the academic program.

discipline.title: Discipline
discipline.description: An academic discipline associated with an academic program.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Discipline.

administeringInstitutionUnit.title: Administering Institution Unit
administeringInstitutionUnit.description: The institutional unit that administers the discipline (major, minor, concentration), typically a department within a school or college.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Administering Institution Unit.

startOn.title: Start On
startOn.description: The date on which the discipline begins for the student academic program.

endOn.title: End On
endOn.description: The date on which the discipline ends for the student academic program.

parentDiscipline.title: Parent Discipline
parentDiscipline.description: The academic discipline that is one level higher in the discipline hierarchy.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Parent Discipline.

status.title: Status
status.description: The state of a student's discipline within a program.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Status.

startOn.title: Start Date
startOn.description: The date on which an academic program begins.

endOn.title: End Date
endOn.description: The date on which an academic program ends.

academicPeriods.title: Academic Periods
academicPeriods.description: Various academic periods related to a student's progression in a program.

starting.title: Starting
starting.description: The starting academic period of student's enrollment in the program

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Starting.

expectedGraduation.title: Expected Graduation
expectedGraduation.description: The academic period in which the student is expected to graduate.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Expected Graduation.

actualGraduation.title: Actual Graduation
actualGraduation.description: The academic period in which the student actually graduated.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Actual Graduation.

enrollmentStatus.title: Enrollment Status
enrollmentStatus.description: The current state of a student's academic program enrollment.

status.title: Enrollment Status
status.description: The status of the academic program enrollment.

detail.title: Detail
detail.description: Details related to the academic enrollment.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Detail.

recognitions.title: Recognitions
recognitions.description: A list of academic recognitions the student has received.

items.title: Recognitions
items.description: A list of academic recognitions the student has received.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Recognitions.

expectedGraduationDate.title: Expected Graduation Date
expectedGraduationDate.description: The date on which the student is expected to graduate from the academic program.

graduatedOn.title: Graduated On
graduatedOn.description: The date the student graduated from the program.

credentialsDate.title: Credentials Date
credentialsDate.description: The date when credentials were issued to the student for the program.

admissionClassification.title: Admission Classification
admissionClassification.description: The admission classification and/or the type typically captured upon admission to the program.

admissionCategory.title: Admission Category
admissionCategory.description: The student's admission category (e.g. first-time, transfer, returning, freshman).

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Admission Category.

associatedCurriculum.title: Associated Curriculum
associatedCurriculum.description: The associated, matriculated, or outcome curriculum record of the program.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Associated Curriculum.
